# mailu_relay (Resource)

Manages a Mailu relay.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mailu_relay" "example" {
  name    = "example.com"
  smtp    = "smtp.example.net"
  comment = "Managed by Terraform"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `comment` (String)
- `smtp` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
